hint: A young nobleman travels to a harsh desert planet to secure the most valuable resource in the universe.
A young sea monster experiences an unforgettable seaside summer on the Italian Riviera.
A jazz musician gets trapped in a strange realm and must find his way back to his body.
A young boy journeys into the Land of the Dead to uncover his family's musical history.
A mother and her young son finally escape after being held captive in a tiny shed for years.
Siblings running a horse ranch discover a terrifying, cloud-dwelling UFO hovering over their property.
A failed comedian descends into madness and becomes a notorious criminal mastermind in Gotham.
Two rival Formula One drivers push themselves to the breaking point during the 1976 season.
A prominent chef quits his restaurant job and buys a food truck to reclaim his creative passion.
An Indian man adopted by an Australian family uses Google Earth to find his lost childhood home.
An optimistic koala hosts a grand singing competition to save his struggling theater.
A brave Polynesian teenager sets sail on a daring mission to save her people.
An aging mutant comes out of hiding to protect a young girl with powers similar to his own.
An arrogant god is stripped of his powers and banished to Earth to learn humility.
A CIA agent stages a fake sci-fi movie production to rescue hostages in Iran.
A woman gains superhuman abilities after a synthetic drug is accidentally absorbed into her bloodstream.
Astronauts aboard the ISS discover a rapidly evolving alien organism that threatens their survival.
A well-meaning but selfish young woman meddles in the love lives of her friends in 1800s England.
Two British soldiers are tasked with delivering an urgent message across enemy lines during WWI.
A secret agent learns to manipulate the flow of time to prevent a future global catastrophe.
A journalist bonds with an alien symbiote that gives him monstrous superpowers.
A Scottish princess defies tradition and accidentally curses her family, forcing her to undo the magic.
A deaf writer who retreated into the woods must fight for her life when a masked killer appears.
A lightning-fast blue hedgehog teams up with a human sheriff to stop a mad scientist.
The son of a famous boxer seeks out his father's greatest rival to train him for the ring.
Three men with superhuman abilities are locked in a psychiatric facility.
A father and his two teenage daughters are hunted by a massive, rogue lion in South Africa.
The life and music of the King of Rock and Roll is explored through his complex relationship with his manager.
A doctor is haunted by a terrifying curse that makes people grin unsettlingly before they die.
A commercial pilot must team up with an accused murderer to save his passengers after a crash landing.
Three girls are kidnapped by a man who possesses 23 distinct personalities.
An aspiring photographer develops an intimate relationship with an older woman in 1950s New York.
A Hollywood stunt driver who moonlights as a getaway driver gets in over his head with the mob.
An everyday man transforms himself into a wrench-wielding superhero to save his wife from a drug dealer.
A news producer and anchor face massive backlash after airing a controversial report about the President.
A disgraced chef attempts to rebuild his career and earn his third Michelin star in London.
A fearless young woman disguises herself as a man to battle northern invaders in China.
A young orphan girl is taken to live with her reclusive grandfather in the Swiss Alps.
A cyber security expert teams up with his estranged private-eye father to solve a murder.
A veteran con artist takes a novice under his wing but gets romantically involved.
A videographer answers a strange online ad to film a dying man's final messages to his unborn son.
Three boys who make a living picking through garbage find a wallet that corrupt cops desperately want.
A loving father puts on a clown suit for his son's birthday but finds he cannot take it off.
A teenage girl raised in the wilderness by her father is trained to be the perfect assassin.
A heroic pilot faces an intense investigation after safely landing a damaged passenger plane on the Hudson River.
A struggling circus owner enlists a former star to care for a newborn elephant with oversized ears.
An ailing inventor builds a robot to protect his beloved dog in a post-apocalyptic world.
A robotics engineer builds a lifelike AI doll that becomes dangerously overprotective of her niece.
A futuristic law enforcer fights his way up a 200-story high-rise to take down a drug lord.
A deactivated cyborg is revived by a doctor and must discover her extraordinary past.
A young woman trapped on an isolated farm slowly descends into madness while dreaming of stardom.
A young, eccentric chocolatier arrives in Europe to open a shop and challenge the chocolate cartel.
The only hearing member of a deaf family discovers a passion for singing.
Two men with commitment issues attempt to navigate a genuine relationship with each other.
A witty, alcoholic screenwriter races to finish the script for Citizen Kane.
A lone warrior searches for the last dragon to restore peace to her fractured fantasy world.
A man is chosen by the Creator to undertake a momentous mission before an apocalyptic flood.
A group of friends accidentally invite a demonic presence into their homes during a Zoom seance.
A marathon swimmer attempts to swim from Cuba to Florida without a shark cage at age 60.
A quiet bureaucratic insider slowly becomes the most powerful Vice President in American history.
A tribe of felines must decide yearly which one will ascend to the Heaviside Layer.
A legendary performer struggles with her health and management during a series of sold-out London shows.
Two British comic-book geeks traveling across the US encounter an alien outside Area 51.
A geeky high schooler from a tough neighborhood gets caught up in a dangerous underground drug transaction.
A year in the life of a middle-class family's maid in Mexico City during the 1970s.
A CIA officer goes on the run after a defector accuses her of being a Russian spy.
An orphan living in the walls of a Paris train station gets wrapped up in a mystery involving an automaton.
A princess sets off on a journey alongside an iceman to find her estranged sister whose icy powers trapped their kingdom.
A rookie bunny cop and a cynical con artist fox must work together to uncover a conspiracy in a mammalian metropolis.
Happy, singing creatures must rescue their friends from giant, miserable monsters who eat them to feel joy.
A Colombian teenage girl is the only member of her family without magical powers.
A magically long-haired princess who has spent her life in a tower meets a handsome thief.
Small, yellow henchmen travel to a villain convention in the 1960s to find a new evil master to serve.
Two elf brothers embark on a magical quest to spend one last day with their late father.
A star race car and his tow truck best friend get caught up in international espionage.
A veteran race car is pushed out of the sport by a new generation of blazing-fast racers.
A crop-dusting aircraft with a fear of heights pursues his dream of competing in a famous aerial race.
Birds that have moved on from delivering babies to delivering packages accidentally activate a Baby Making Machine.
Two astronauts work together to survive after an accident leaves them stranded in deep space.
James Bond's loyalty to M is tested when her past comes back to haunt her.
A cryptic message from his past sends James Bond on a trail to uncover a sinister organization.
A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after mysterious spacecraft land worldwide.
A young Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and discovers a disturbing secret.
A destitute family schemes to become employed by a wealthy family by infiltrating their household.
A washed-up superhero actor struggles to mount a Broadway play to reclaim his former glory.
A wisecracking mercenary undergoes a rogue experiment that leaves him with accelerated healing powers.
The half-human, half-Atlantean heir to the underwater kingdom of Atlantis must step forward to lead his people.
A teenage foster kid transforms into an adult superhero simply by shouting one magic word.
A master thief dons a super-suit with the astonishing ability to shrink in scale but increase in strength.
Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team to stop a mischievous god.
Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire, and France are surrounded by the German army and evacuated during WWII.
An idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by a government task force to aid in the escalating war against drugs.
The life of a boy is chronicled from early childhood to his arrival at college, filmed over 12 years.
A promising young drummer enrolls at a cutthroat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are tested.
A young boy's childhood is chronicled amidst the tumult of late-1960s Northern Ireland.
A famous doll suffers a crisis that leads her to question her world and her existence.
A tale of outsized ambition and outrageous excess in 1920s Hollywood.
A young couple travels to a remote island to eat at an exclusive restaurant where the chef has prepared a shocking menu.
A new killer dons the Ghostface mask to target a group of teenagers and resurrect secrets from a town's deadly past.
Immortal beings emerge from hiding to protect Earth from their ancient counterparts.
The rebellious early days of one of cinema's most notorious and fashion-forward villains.
A docile family man slowly reveals his true character after his house is burglarized.
The story of the Battle of Midway, told by the leaders and the sailors who fought it.
A filmed version of the acclaimed Broadway musical about the Founding Fathers.
A biochemist tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease but inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism.
A bank teller discovers he is actually a non-player character in a brutal, open-world video game.
A visual artist explores the macabre history of an urban legend in a gentrified Chicago neighborhood.
Four teenagers are sucked into a magical video game and must survive the jungle to escape.
A primatologist must save Chicago from a silverback gorilla, a wolf, and a crocodile that have mutated into giants.
A deep-sea rescue diver is recruited to save the crew of a submersible from a massive, prehistoric shark.
Dom Toretto and his family are targeted by the vengeful son of drug kingpin Hernan Reyes.
A drone repairman assigned to an Earth left ruined by alien war discovers a shocking truth about his mission.
The world's most famous monster is pitted against malevolent creatures who threaten humanity's very existence.
The peaceful realm of Azeroth stands on the brink of war as its civilization faces a fearsome race of invaders.
A kind-hearted street urchin and a power-hungry Grand Vizier vie for a magic lamp that has the power to make their deepest wishes come true.
A group of friends joins a guide for a trek into the Bolivian Amazon, which quickly turns into a nightmare.
A legendary Greek hero becomes a mercenary and is hired by the King of Thrace to train his army.
The defiant leader Moses rises up against the Egyptian Pharaoh Ramses, leading 400,000 slaves on a monumental journey.
A Russian immigrant goes on a mission to prove that he is the greatest hunter in the world.
In the near future, an experimental police droid is stolen and reprogrammed with the ability to think and feel for itself.
A father goes undercover for the DEA in order to free his son, who was imprisoned after being set up in a drug deal.
A physician who can talk to animals embarks on an epic adventure to a mythical island to find a cure for the young Queen.
A proficient group of bank robbers gets pursued by a relentless FBI agent while one falls in love with a hostage.
In a future where people stop aging at 25, a man is falsely accused of murder and must figure out how to survive.
A hitman in the past must execute a target sent back from the future—until the target turns out to be his older self.
In the year 2154, the very wealthy live on a man-made space station while the rest of the population resides on a ruined Earth.
A Scottish duke receives a prophecy from a trio of witches that one day he will become King of Scotland.
Publishers and editors of the Washington Post join an unprecedented battle between the press and the government.
Four women with nothing in common except a debt left behind by their dead husbands' criminal activities take fate into their own hands.
An astronaut travels to the outer edges of the solar system to find his missing father and unravel a mystery.
A wayward prince ascends the English throne upon his father's death, and must navigate the politics of war.
When an unseen enemy takes over humanity by erasing their memories, one woman risks everything to protect the men she loves.
A technophobe receives an experimental computer chip implant that grants him superhuman abilities to seek revenge.
In 2028 Detroit, a multinational conglomerate sees its chance for a part-man, part-robot police officer.
A mother and her two children blindfold themselves to navigate a dangerous river and avoid mysterious creatures that cause suicide.
An American video game salesman travels to the Soviet Union to secure the rights to a wildly addictive puzzle game.
An Oxford university student finds himself drawn into the charming and aristocratic world of his wealthy classmate.
The story of the activist who helped organize the 1963 March on Washington.
A love letter to life and art that chronicles the lifelong relationship between Leonard Bernstein and Felicia Montealegre.
A reclusive author of espionage novels realizes her plots are mirroring the real-world actions of a secret spy organization.
An epic that details the checkered rise and fall of the iconic French Emperor.
During the summer of 1957, an ex-racecar driver is in crisis as bankruptcy stalks the company he and his wife built.
An American civilian truck driver in Iraq wakes up in a wooden coffin with only a lighter and a cell phone.
Tony Stark's world is torn apart by a formidable terrorist called the Mandarin, forcing him to rebuild.
An ex-hitman comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and stole his car.
When his daughter is abducted and the police investigation stalls, a desperate father takes matters into his own hands.
With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him.
While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their aspirations for the future.
The true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered the massive scandal of child molestation within the local Catholic Archdiocese.
A chronicle of the childhood, adolescence and burgeoning adulthood of a young, African-American, gay man growing up in a rough neighborhood of Miami.
A working-class Italian-American bouncer becomes the driver of an African-American classical pianist on a tour of venues through the 1960s American South.
A detective investigates the death of a patriarch of an eccentric, combative family.
A young boy in Hitler's army finds out his mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their home.
A woman in her sixties who, after losing everything in the Great Recession, embarks on a journey through the American West.
The story of the American scientist and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.
A reclusive, morbidly obese English teacher attempts to reconnect with his estranged teenage daughter.
Nearly 5,000 years after he was bestowed with the almighty powers of the Egyptian gods, a warrior is freed from his earthly tomb.
A vigilante detective in Gotham City investigates a hidden world of corruption tied to his own family while pursuing a serial killer.
A U.S. Navy commander must lead an Allied convoy being stalked by Nazi U-boat wolfpacks during World War II.
A 13-year-old girl is torn between staying her mother's dutiful daughter and the changes of adolescence, which periodically turn her into a giant red panda.
The definitive origin story of the legendary Space Ranger who inspired a famous toy.
Two adoptive siblings bank robbers hijack an emergency vehicle with a wounded cop and a paramedic on board.
A street-smart thief is recruited by a seasoned treasure hunter to recover a fortune lost by Ferdinand Magellan.
Natasha Romanoff confronts the darker parts of her ledger when a dangerous conspiracy with ties to her past arises.
After a young girl is uprooted from her Midwest life and moved to San Francisco, her emotions conflict on how best to navigate a new city.
A criminal mastermind uses a trio of orphan girls as pawns for a grand scheme, but finds their love profoundly changing him.
A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home and finds himself lost at Paddington Station.
A mischievous and adventurous bunny's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before.
In the aftermath of a massive earthquake in California, a rescue-chopper pilot makes a dangerous journey to rescue his daughter.
Dominic Toretto and his crew of street racers plan a massive heist to buy their freedom while in the sights of a powerful Brazilian drug lord.
The CIA's most lethal former operative is drawn out of the shadows to uncover more explosive truths about his past.
A soldier fighting aliens gets to relive the same day over and over again, the day restarting every time he dies.
As a war between humankind and monstrous sea creatures wages on, a former pilot and a trainee are paired up to drive a seemingly obsolete special weapon.
The fiercely independent daughter of a missing adventurer must push herself beyond her limits when she discovers the island where her father disappeared.
A CGI remake where a young lion prince flees his kingdom only to learn the true meaning of responsibility and bravery.
A dark, stop-motion retelling of the classic tale of a wooden puppet who wants to be a real boy in 1930s Italy.
A live-action retelling where a girl's cruel stepmother and stepsisters prevent her from attending the Royal Ball.
A vengeful fairy is driven to curse an infant princess, only to discover that the child may be the one person who can restore peace to their troubled land.
An alien infant is raised on Earth and must become a symbol of hope for mankind when members of his race threaten the planet.
When a pilot crashes and tells of conflict in the outside world, an Amazonian princess leaves home to fight a war to end all wars.
A secret government agency recruits some of the most dangerous incarcerated super-villains to form a defensive task force.
After splitting with the Joker, Harley Quinn joins superheroes Black Canary, Huntress and Renee Montoya to save a young girl from an evil crime lord.
Fueled by his restored faith in humanity, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of his newfound ally, Diana Prince, to face an even greater enemy.
While on a journey of physical and spiritual healing, a brilliant neurosurgeon is drawn into the world of the mystic arts.
T'Challa, heir to the hidden but advanced kingdom of Wakanda, must step forward to lead his people into a new future.
An extraterrestrial Kree warrior finds herself caught in the middle of an intergalactic battle between her people and the Skrulls.
A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe.
A martial arts master must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.
A paramedic with clairvoyant abilities is forced to confront her past while trying to save three young women with powerful futures.
Five young mutants, just discovering their abilities while held in a secret facility against their will, fight to escape their past sins.
Jean Grey begins to develop incredible powers that corrupt and turn her into a Dark Phoenix, causing the X-Men to decide if her life is worth more than humanity.
In the 1960s, superpowered humans Charles Xavier and Erik Lensherr work together to find others like them, but their rift over mutant integration turns them into enemies.
Summoned to Japan by an old acquaintance, Logan becomes embroiled in a conflict that forces him to confront his own demons.
Four young outsiders teleport to an alternate and dangerous universe which alters their physical form in shocking ways.
Katniss Everdeen voluntarily takes her younger sister's place in a televised competition in which two teenagers from each of the twelve Districts of Panem are chosen at random to fight to the death.
In a world divided by factions based on virtues, a teenage girl learns she doesn't fit into any one group and discovers a plot to destroy those like her.
A boy wakes up in an elevator, remembering nothing but his name, and emerges into a world of boys trapped in a massive puzzle.
When the creator of a virtual reality called the OASIS dies, he makes a posthumous challenge to all OASIS users to find his Easter Egg, which will give the finder his fortune.
A deactivated cyborg is revived, but cannot remember anything of her past life and goes on a quest to find out who she is.
A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years.
In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners and a drifter.
A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.
A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his team assume him dead, and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to signal to Earth that he is alive.
Following clues to the origin of mankind, a team finds a structure on a distant moon, but they soon realize they are not alone.
The crew of a colony ship, bound for a remote planet, discover an uncharted paradise with a threat beyond their imagination.
A new theme park, built on the original site of Jurassic Park, creates a genetically modified hybrid dinosaur, the Indominus Rex, which escapes containment.
Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane traverses the world in a race against time to stop a zombie pandemic.
While a zombie virus breaks out in South Korea, passengers struggle to survive on the train from Seoul to Busan.
A family is forced to live in silence while hiding from blind extraterrestrial creatures that hunt by sound.
Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse.
A couple begins to experience terrifying supernatural occurrences involving a vintage doll shortly after their home is invaded by satanic cultists.
Twenty-seven years after their first encounter with the terrifying Pennywise, the Losers Club have grown up and moved away, until a devastating phone call brings them back.
The nightmare isn't over as unstoppable killer Michael Myers escapes from Laurie Strode's trap to continue his ritual bloodbath.
A twisted tale of two estranged sisters whose reunion is cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons.
Miles Morales catapults across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence.
Still reeling from the loss of Gamora, Peter Quill rallies his team to defend the universe and one of their own.
John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table, but before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy.
Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet to track down a terrifying new weapon.
During the 1990s, a new faction of Transformers - the Maximals - join the Autobots as allies in the battle for Earth.
A young mermaid makes a deal with a sea witch to trade her beautiful voice for human legs so she can discover the world above water.
In a city where fire, water, land and air residents live together, a fiery young woman and a go-with-the-flow guy discover something elemental.
A troubled security guard begins working at an abandoned pizzeria and quickly realizes the night shift won't be so easy to make it through.
Members of the Osage tribe in the United States are murdered under mysterious circumstances in the 1920s.
A musical adaptation of Alice Walker's novel about the lifelong struggles of an African-American woman living in the South.
After an amazing first date, Bea and Ben's fiery attraction turns ice cold - until they find themselves unexpectedly reunited at a destination wedding.
The incredible tale about the fantastical evolution of Bella Baxter, a young woman brought back to life by the brilliant and unorthodox Dr. Godwin Baxter.
A novelist who's fed up with the establishment profiting from 'Black' entertainment uses a pen name to write a book that propels him to the heart of hypocrisy.
A cranky history teacher at a remote prep school is forced to remain on campus over the holidays with a troubled student who has no place to go.
Two deeply connected childhood friends are wrest apart after one's family emigrates from South Korea, only to be reunited two decades later.
A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.
With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help, but when a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear.
Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team to stop a mischievous god and his alien army.
When Tony Stark and Bruce Banner try to jump-start a dormant peacekeeping program, things go horribly wrong.
The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos before his blitz of devastation.
After the devastating events of the previous film, the remaining heroes assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos' actions.
With the world now aware of his identity as Iron Man, Tony Stark must contend with both his declining health and a vengeful mad man tied to his father's legacy.
Steve Rogers, a rejected military soldier, transforms into a super-soldier after taking a dose of a 'Super-Soldier serum'.
Political involvement in the Avengers' affairs causes a rift between Captain America and Iron Man.
Imprisoned on the planet Sakaar, Thor must race against time to return to Asgard and stop a ruthless villain.
Thor enlists the help of Valkyrie, Korg and ex-girlfriend Jane Foster to fight a galactic killer known as Gorr the God Butcher.
Carol Danvers gets her powers entangled with those of Kamala Khan and Monica Rambeau, forcing them to work together to save the universe.
